visualization.title: Count of Mandatory vs Optional Prerequisites

resultRaw.sql: SELECT prerequisites.is_mandatory AS is_mandatory, COUNT(*) AS prerequisite_count FROM public.prerequisites AS prerequisites GROUP BY prerequisites.is_mandatory ORDER BY prerequisites.is_mandatory DESC;

issues: Tooltip will likely show raw boolean values (true/false) rather than the friendly labels 'Mandatory'/'Optional' — consider formatting tooltip to use the same labelExpr or a calculated field.

No temporal axis is needed (is_mandatory is boolean); if a different grouping (e.g., by course or department) or normalization (percentages) was desired, that is not implemented in the current SQL/visualization.

visualization.title: Count of Mandatory vs Optional Prerequisites

result.sql: SELECT prerequisites.is_mandatory AS is_mandatory, COUNT(*) AS prerequisite_count FROM public.prerequisites AS prerequisites GROUP BY prerequisites.is_mandatory ORDER BY prerequisites.is_mandatory DESC;

issues: Tooltip will likely show raw boolean values (true/false) rather than the friendly labels 'Mandatory'/'Optional' — consider formatting tooltip to use the same labelExpr or a calculated field.

No temporal axis is needed (is_mandatory is boolean); if a different grouping (e.g., by course or department) or normalization (percentages) was desired, that is not implemented in the current SQL/visualization.
